mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (student_no, student_name, major, class_name, phone, email) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{studentName}, #{major}, #{className}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_name=#{studentName}, major=#{major}, class_name=#{className}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, update_time=NOW() WHERE student_id=#{studentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student s LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON s.student_id = ua.related_id AND ua.role='STUDENT' WHERE 1=1
AND (s.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR s.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR s.major LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR s.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND ua.status=#{status} AND (ua.status IS NULL OR ua.status = 1)
